---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for the cuOPT Interactive Frontend
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your request related to a specific use case or limitation you've encountered?

<!-- Example: "When viewing optimized routes, I need to compare before/after metrics side-by-side but the current layout only shows the final result." -->

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Affected Area

Which part of the project does this request apply to?

- [ ] Dashboard / route optimization UI
- [ ] Map visualization (Leaflet or Google Maps)
- [ ] Chat / GenAI integration
- [ ] Weather panel
- [ ] Admin panel
- [ ] Backend API proxy (server/)
- [ ] Authentication / authorization
- [ ] Docker / Kubernetes deployment
- [ ] CI/CD / testing
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? If so, describe them and why they don't fully solve the problem.

## Additional Context

Any links, mockups, references, screenshots, or other context that would help understand the request.
